fixtures.assertion_boundary: in-process HTTP route handler plus verifier API
fixtures.basis: Close evidence drives handle_http_request and ResourceServerConfig::validate from a crate test; it does not start the installed oraclemcp artifact and issue raw external HTTP.
fixtures.binding: Needs a C1 wire lift before WS-C can close.
fixtures.title: OAuth literal JWT

fixtures.basis: Close evidence uses serve_stdio_with_io from a crate test; it does not execute the installed binary over raw stdio.
fixtures.binding: Needs a C2 wire lift before WS-C can close.
fixtures.title: Stdio init-token literal frame

fixtures.basis: Close evidence drives handle_http_request directly; it does not run TLS/mTLS through the installed artifact.
fixtures.binding: Needs a C3 wire lift before WS-C can close.
fixtures.title: mTLS literal fingerprints

fixtures.assertion_boundary: installed artifact plus Chromium browser wire
fixtures.basis: Bound to R3/C4 close evidence: rig_browser_lane builds the installed artifact with omcpb, then Playwright drives Chromium against the served dashboard.
fixtures.binding: No duplicate fixture required; C4 is the binding.
fixtures.title: Dashboard browser flow

fixtures.basis: Close evidence asserts setup ordering in the session-context builder layer, not through a running installed server connection.
fixtures.binding: Needs a C5 wire lift before WS-C can close.
fixtures.title: Session setup ordering

fixtures.basis: C6 crosses a process boundary, but the recorded fixture uses the Cargo test harness and CARGO_BIN_EXE rather than the installed artifact under the rig.
fixtures.binding: Needs a C6 installed-artifact lift before WS-C can close.
fixtures.title: CLI versus running server collision

fixtures.basis: Close evidence asserts the builder contract directly; it does not issue a raw MCP tool call to a running installed artifact.
fixtures.binding: Needs a C7 wire lift before WS-C can close.
fixtures.title: Zero-row columns population

fixtures.assertion_boundary: catalog resolver API with mocked connection
fixtures.basis: Close evidence asserts catalog_resolver behavior directly; it does not query a running installed artifact over MCP wire.
fixtures.binding: Needs a C8 wire lift before WS-C can close.
fixtures.title: Blind catalog refusal

fixtures.assertion_boundary: installed artifact plus raw stdio/HTTP clients
fixtures.basis: Bound to C9 close evidence: onboarding_snippet_truth installs oraclemcp from a git archive of HEAD, extracts real setup output, and runs raw JSON-RPC/HTTP clients.
fixtures.binding: No duplicate fixture required; C9 is the binding.
fixtures.title: Onboarding snippet truth

requirement: Every C1-C9 fixture that asserts a process or protocol contract must prove it over the wire against the installed oraclemcp artifact. C4 and C9 bind to their existing installed-artifact lanes instead of duplicating them.
